name: Grits Fiesta Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (4 oz) Monterey Jack cheese, shredded and divided
3 tablespoons Green bell pepper, cored, seeded, and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring the water and garlic powder to a boil; stir in the grits. Return to a boil; reduce heat and cook 4 minutes, stirring occasionally. Remove from the heat.
2. In a bowl, combine the flour and Cheddar cheese; stir into the grits. Stir the egg into the mixture until well blended.
3. Spoon the mixture into a lightly greased 9-inch pie plate and press with the back of a spoon to form a pie shell.
4. In a large skillet, cook the ground beef and taco seasoning mix until the meat browns; drain.
5. Spread the meat mixture into the pie shell.
6. Top with 3/4 cup Monterey Jack cheese, tomatoes, black olives, and green bell pepper.
7. In a bowl, combine the remaining eggs and milk; pour over the pie.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with the remaining Monterey Jack cheese. Let stand for 5 minutes before slicing. Makes 6 servings.
